2605.10916.title: Confidence-Guided Diffusion Augmentation for Enhanced Bangla Compound Character Recognition
2605.10916.paper_summary: Recognition of handwritten Bangla compound characters remains a challenging problem due to complex character structures, large intra-class variation, and limited availability of high-quality annotated data. Existing Bangla handwritten character recognition systems often struggle to generalize across diverse writing styles, particularly for compound characters containing intricate ligatures and diacritical variations. In this work, we propose a confidence-guided diffusion augmentation framework for low-resolution Bangla compound character recognition. Our framework combines class-conditional diffusion modeling with classifier guidance to synthesize high-quality handwritten compound character samples. To further improve generation quality, we introduce Squeeze-and-Excitation enhanced residual blocks within the diffusion model's U-Net backbone. We additionally propose a confidence-based filtering mechanism where pre-trained classifiers act as quality gates to retain only highly class-consistent synthetic samples. The filtered synthetic images are fused with the original training data and used to retrain multiple classification architectures. Experiments conducted on the AIBangla compound character dataset demonstrate consistent performance improvements across ResNet50, DenseNet121, VGG16, and Vision Transformer architectures. Our best-performing model achieves 89.2\% classification accuracy, surpassing the previously published AIBangla benchmark by a substantial margin. The results demonstrate that quality-aware diffusion augmentation can effectively enhance handwritten character recognition performance in low-resource script domains.
2605.10916.paper_summary_zh: 手寫孟加拉複合字符的識別仍然是一個具有挑戰性的問題，這是由於字符結構的複雜性、類內變異性的大以及高品質標註數據的有限可用性。現有的孟加拉手寫字符識別系統通常難以在多樣的書寫風格中進行泛化，特別是對於包含複雜連字和變音符號變化的複合字符。在這項工作中，我們提出了一個基於信心引導的擴散增強框架，用於低解析度的孟加拉複合字符識別。我們的框架將類條件擴散建模與分類器引導相結合，以合成高品質的手寫複合字符樣本。為了進一步提高生成質量，我們在擴散模型的U-Net骨幹中引入了壓縮與激勵增強的殘差塊。我們還提出了一種基於信心的過濾機制，其中預訓練的分類器充當質量門檻，只保留高度類一致的合成樣本。過濾後的合成圖像與原始訓練數據融合，並用於重新訓練多個分類架構。在AIBangla複合字符數據集上進行的實驗顯示，ResNet50、DenseNet121、VGG16和Vision Transformer架構的性能一致改善。我們表現最佳的模型達到了89.2\%的分類準確率，顯著超過了先前發表的AIBangla基準。結果表明，質量感知的擴散增強可以有效提高低資源腳本領域的手寫字符識別性能。
2605.10916.author: Md. Sultan Al Rayhan et.al.
2605.10916.authors: Md. Sultan Al Rayhan, Maheen Islam
